nodes.label: AI as grounding guide for unfamiliar terrain
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or conflicting source
nodes.grounding_span: having someone or something with confident information that can help us navigate the unknown waters is tremendously helpful

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: This is where trust (or lack thereof) comes in for me with AI

nodes.label: AI as honest constructive critic
nodes.grounding_span: I would not trust it with feedback, either, as so many models focus on pandering to the user

nodes.label: AI as scheduling assistant for complex logistics
nodes.label_negative: AI as poor at local timing and logistics
nodes.grounding_span: I trust it more with helping me come up with a game plan of actions, or a schedule

nodes.label: AI as democratizing tool for independent creators
nodes.label_negative: AI as job-stealing tool for wealthy gatekeepers
nodes.grounding_span: AI can open doorways for people to scale their own movies and shows independently without having to secure funding

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as originator of creative content
nodes.grounding_span: The other murky area is where AI comes up with the creative content. That should not be able to be awarded or thought of in the same arena as human-created content

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to be at the forefront of integrating AI into live action filming

nodes.label: Professional integrity and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: Professionally, I depend on constructive criticism rather than praise

nodes.label: Empowerment of independent creators
nodes.grounding_span: AI can open doorways for people to scale their own movies and shows independently

nodes.label: Positive acceptance of AI for business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: why not harness it and use it to my advantage?

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for critical feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I would not trust it with feedback

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I input the same pilot episode into four different models, and received four different outputs

nodes.label: Hope for AI as democratizing force
nodes.grounding_span: AI can open doorways for people to scale their own movies and shows independently

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: That should not be able to be awarded or thought of in the same arena as human-created content

nodes.label: Experiential local knowledge calibration
nodes.grounding_span: I can tell you how long it would take me to walk or use the subway between any two locations in Manhattan or Brooklyn without having to think about it

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I have to do a lot of adjusting since it is pretty bad with timing between locations versus what my brain immediately knows
